positive: A minimalist, vintage-style botanical print featuring a cluster of wild lavender and eucalyptus leaves. The illustration should use clean, thin line work, cross-hatching, and a muted color palette (sepia, sage green, dusty blue). Scientific illustration style, etching print, elegant.
